name: agentar-cli
description: Standalone CLI for searching, listing, installing, and exporting agentars.

env_vars.name: AGENTAR_API_BASE_URL
env_vars.description: Override the default API base URL (https://catchclaw.me)

env_vars.name: AGENTAR_HOME
env_vars.description: Override the default CLI config directory (~/.agentar)

credentials.description: API key for agentars that require backend authentication
